next_action: Keep file-backed source-backed memory as the auditable substrate and expand the benchmark suite so memory/control changes are judged by measured behavior instead of premature infrastructure.
overclaim_boundary: File-backed memory is not the breakthrough by itself, and a benchmark suite still must not claim lift until the evidence passes the gate.
rationale: The current gap is not a missing vector store; it is proving that the layered memory/control/eval loop improves Codex behavior.
